coupon.source_phrase_block: This is a physical pass and must be picked up from and returned to the library . This pass is valid for regular on-site rentals at all locations during regular hours of operation during the boating season (the first weekend in May through mid-October, weather permitting). This pass is not valid for Fourth of July Fireworks Rentals or any other special event or activity . Hours of Operation and Directions: Stoneham: Spot Pond (closed weekdays after Labor Day) Boston: Allston/Brighton
